creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I am occasionally having a hard time with iwm driver on my ThinkPad T440, in a way that I suffer frequent disconnects which require me to `service netif restart'.

But today it crashed complete OS for the first time. Perhaps it is time to file a PR, hopefully someone picks it up.

pacija@efreet-freebsd:~ % sudo freebsd-version -ku
11.0-RELEASE-p9
11.0-RELEASE-p10

pacija@efreet-freebsd:~ % sudo dmesg | grep 7260
iwm0: <Intel Dual Band Wireless AC 7260> mem 0xe0400000-0xe0401fff at device 0.0 on pci2

Here's excerpt from messages log:
